SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FENNELL, SHERRELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION AZARI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $71.67 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $161.67, THE NOTICE OF LIEN PREVIOUSLY RECORDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S UNIT IS ORDERED EXPUNGED. STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION FENNELL, SHERRELL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT FENNELL, SHERRELL TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION STIPULATED JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: 1) SHERRELL FENNELL IS CURRENT IN ALL ASSESSMENTS OF 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS OF OCTOBER 21, 2010; 2) ALL PENALTIES ASSESSED AGAINST SHERRELL FENNELL UP TO OCTOBER 21, 2010 ARE NULL AND VOID; 3) 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION WILL FORTHWITH REMOVE THE LIEN FILED AGAINST SHERRELL FENNELL; 4) 400 ALEMANY BOULEVARD WILL FILE A SMALL CLAIM ACTION AGAINST AZARI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AND SHERRELL FENNELL WILL BE ENTITLED TO RECEIVE UP NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:13am
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, 400 Alemany Blvd Homeowners Association appears through Patrick Deloia. Respondent, Sherrell Fennell appears with her attorney Ingrid Eberle.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Renne.

EXHR (1) Trial Brief
EXHR (2) Declaration of Restrictions
EXHA (A) Homeowner Account History
EXHR (3) 2 page document titled Pro Solutions
EXHR (4) Copies of 3 checks, 1 page
EXHR (5) Duplicate copies of checks, several pages

9:52am
Recess taken for parties to reach a resolution.
10:31am
Matter resumes

10:34am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Judgment Entered
